upgrade.name: Atlas lane map aura focus layer
upgrade.summary: Added hover and keyboard-focus lane map feedback with route glow, animated node aura sparks, and a reusable Lane Focus readout derived from lane data.

research.query: game skill tree node hover animation particle trail UI design inspiration
research.takeaway: Skill-tree interfaces benefit from immediate local emphasis around the selected node and its connecting path.

research.query: gamified dashboard map node hover aura animation UX
research.takeaway: Operational dashboards can use subtle non-blocking hover motion to expose context while preserving scan speed.

research.query: achievement map progression UI node connections particle effects
research.takeaway: Progression maps feel more game-like when routes, nodes, and reward/status readouts animate together.

implementation: Added a map focus panel mount inside the map stage in web/index.html.
Added hovered-lane state and map focus rendering in web/app.js.
Assigned route lane IDs so the selected, hovered, or keyboard-focused lane can highlight its route.
Added node aura spark markup to each lane node without changing the snapshot data contract.
Added pointer and keyboard focus event handlers for reusable map focus behavior.
Added CSS for route glow, animated node rings, spark drift, and the Lane Focus readout.
Documented inherited lane-map focus behavior in web/README.md.

browserValidation.hoverAutomationNote: The pointer hit target for a different lane was confirmed, but the in-app browser coordinate move did not dispatch pointerover consistently. Click and keyboard-focus rendering paths were validated.
